traces.name: stale_selector
traces.label: stale_selector
traces.injection: Test targets the old #search-box id; the box is now #search.

traces.name: network_failure
traces.label: network_failure
traces.injection: Playwright route fails GET /api/fruits.json (HTTP 503) — data the app depends on.

traces.name: real_bug
traces.label: real_bug
traces.injection: ?inject=real_bug inverts the filter, so search returns the non-matching fruits.

traces.name: flaky_timing
traces.label: flaky_timing
traces.injection: ?inject=flaky paints the search result ~3s late; the test asserts within 1.5s.
